title: Zuri's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Join Zuri as she plays peek-a-boo with nature through the changing seasons, discovering flowers in spring, butterflies in summer, leaves in autumn, and snowflakes in winter.

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Spring is here! Zuri finds pink flowers hiding behind green leaves.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, peeking behind cherry blossom branches with soft pink flowers and fresh green leaves in spring pastels
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo behind spring flowers

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Summer sunshine! Bright butterflies dance around Zuri in the warm sun.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, surrounded by colorful butterflies in vibrant summer brights with golden sunshine and lush green grass
illustration.alt: Zuri with butterflies in summer sunshine

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Autumn leaves! Orange and red leaves fall all around Zuri like confetti.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, playing in falling autumn leaves of orange, red, and yellow in autumn warmth tones

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Winter snow! Soft white snowflakes tickle Zuri's nose and make her giggle.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, catching snowflakes on her tongue with gentle white snow falling in winter cool blues and whites

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! All year round, nature plays with Zuri through every season!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, standing in the center with the same tree showing all four seasons divided into quarters around her
illustration.alt: Zuri surrounded by all four seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Zuri find in spring?
questions.explanation: In spring, Zuri finds pink flowers hiding behind green leaves!

questions.question: What falls in autumn?
questions.explanation: In autumn, colorful leaves fall around Zuri like confetti!

questions.question: What tickles Zuri's nose in winter?
questions.explanation: Soft white snowflakes tickle Zuri's nose in winter!
